creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 149705
x11-themes/kde-icons-nuovext2 UNBREAK, MASTER_SITES, MAINTAINER, PORTVERSION

x11-themes/kde-icons-nuovext2
has been unfetchable for some time. I've tracked down
the source. As I'll be maintaining/hosting, I removed
the Mac .DS_Store files, and homogenized the text.
As a result, I've bumped PORTVERSION, and re-named||packed
the archive. I've also taken MAINTAINER

Please see the attached svn(1) diff(1), included. :)

--Chris
